author: @t44beck10
text:
So the project was due Friday, but he had a family emergency on Saturday? 

That doesn’t make sense. 

Was it the previous Saturday? 

Was it the other two Saturdays he could have worked on the project?

author: @sandrasutherland8001
text: One day should not have caused him to be late. He should have been 99% done. I am a cat lover & have two fur babies.  And the cat being stuck in the wall is not a tragic emotional emergency.  Ask for pictures of the wall & you need to talk to the contractor. But having a contractor in the house is not traumatic. Neither is the cat in the wall. Contractor shows up & the cat is out of the wall in ten minutes.
